author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Photography Career Competition - Theme 1 Final Voting

Wow! It's been such an incredible first theme to the Photography Career Competition with way too many epic photos to count. We have our 4 qualifying photos for the "Ships" theme and now the exciting part is in your hands - yes, YOU!  

To cast your vote, refer to the number assigned on each photo and react with that number accordingly.  

The winner will not only be rewarded with minted copies of their winning photo, but they'll also receive support to sell it on our Galactic Marketplace!

Voting ends on
